message:
feat(html): Add HTML export module for self-contained session reports

Introduce html_export module providing standalone HTML generation for
session transcripts. The exported files are designed to be:

- Self-contained: All critical CSS/JS inlined for offline operation
- Progressive enhancement: CDN resources enhance but don't break offline
- Encrypted (optional): Web Crypto compatible encryption for sensitive content
- Accessible: Semantic HTML with proper ARIA attributes

This initial commit includes:
- mod.rs: Module facade with Tokyo Night color palette constants
- template.rs: Core HTML template generation
- styles.rs: CSS with critical inline styles and Tailwind fallback
- scripts.rs: JS for decryption, search, and theme toggle

Note: Additional submodules (encryption.rs, filename.rs, renderer.rs)
referenced in documentation are planned for subsequent commits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
